instruction: Create an iOS26 SwiftUI view using the new LockScreenLiveActivity API to show a running timer.
Show how to use the new iPadOS26 StageManager API to arrange three apps side by side.
Create a macOS26 SwiftUI view using the new MenuBarExtra API to show battery status.
Show how to use the new WatchOS26 InteractiveComplication API to create a tappable hydration tracker.
Create a TVOS26 SwiftUI view using the new FocusedContent API to highlight a selected episode.
Create a VisionOS26 SwiftUI view using the new ImmersiveSpace API to present a virtual aquarium.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published array of Bool values to @Observable for iOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published struct containing a Date property to @Observable for macOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published array of Int values to @Observable for watchOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published set of Ints to @Observable for tvOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published optional String property to @Observable for visionOS26.
Create a WidgetKit widget for iOS26 that displays a favorite animal, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for iPadOS26 that displays a favorite author, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for macOS26 that displays a network speed, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for watchOS26 that displays a hydration goal, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for tvOS26 that displays a favorite show, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for visionOS26 that displays a virtual room temperature, configurable via AppIntent.
Create an iOS26 SwiftUI view using the new AppShortcuts API to add a custom shortcut for a workout.
Show how to use the new iPadOS26 SplitView API to create a two-column layout.
Create a macOS26 SwiftUI view using the new NotificationBanner API to show a warning banner.
Show how to use the new WatchOS26 SleepTracking API to display sleep duration.
Create a TVOS26 SwiftUI view using the new RemoteControl API to show remote battery level.
Create a VisionOS26 SwiftUI view using the new EyeTracking API to show blink count.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published array of structs with a String property to @Observable for iOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published struct containing a Bool property to @Observable for macOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published array of Double values to @Observable for watchOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published set of Strings to @Observable for tvOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published optional Int property to @Observable for visionOS26.
Create a WidgetKit widget for iOS26 that displays a favorite color, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for iPadOS26 that displays a favorite landmark, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for macOS26 that displays a CPU temperature, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for watchOS26 that displays a step goal, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for tvOS26 that displays a favorite actor, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for visionOS26 that displays a detected object name, configurable via AppIntent.
